song.title: You are My Vision (Rend Collective)
song.lyrics: [B] Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh [V1] You are my vision, O King of my heart Nothing else satisfies, only You, Lord You are my best thought by day or by night Waking or sleeping, Your presence my light Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh [V2] You are my wisdom, You are my true word I ever with You and You with me, Lord You're my great Father And I'm Your true son You dwell inside me, together, we're one Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh [V3] You are my battle-shield Sword for the fight You are my dignity, You're my delight You're my soul's shelter And You're my high tow'r Come, raise me heavenward O Power of my power Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh [V4] I don't want riches or man's empty praise You're my inheritance, now and always You, and You only, the first in my heart High King of heaven, my treasure You are Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh [V5] High King of heaven, When victory's won May I reach heaven's joy, O, bright heaven's Son Heart of my own heart, whatever befall Still be my vision, O, Ruler of all Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh [P] Heart of my own heart, whatever befall Still be my vision, O, Ruler of all Oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh
song.author: Rend Collective
